messages.message:
Error: Cannot call impure function during render `Date.now` is an impure function. Calling an impure function can produce unstable results that update unpredictably when the component happens to re-render. (https://react.dev/reference/rules/components-and-hooks-must-be-pure#components-and-hooks-must-be-idempotent). 24 |

25 |

> 26 | Started: {new Date(trip.started_at || Date.now()).toLocaleTimeString()} | ^^^^^^^^^^ Cannot call impure function 27 |

28 | 29 |

suppressedMessages.message: Fast refresh only works when a file only exports components. Use a new file to share constants or functions between components.
